text.title: Speech-to-Text Providers and Cost Comparison (2026)
text.summary: Provider matrix for OpenAI, AssemblyAI, Deepgram, ElevenLabs Scribe, local models; decision framework by use case; audio format recommendations; cost break-even analysis.

list.item: OpenAI Whisper: $0.006/min, 99+ languages, timestamps; best for general accuracy
OpenAI GPT-4o Transcribe: $0.006/min, advanced accuracy, speaker diarization
OpenAI GPT-4o Mini Transcribe: $0.003/min, good accuracy, cheapest OpenAI option
AssemblyAI: $0.002–$0.04/min, 100+ languages, ~300ms latency; best for diarization + summaries
ElevenLabs Scribe: ~150ms latency, 90+ languages; best for real-time low-latency
Deepgram Nova-2: $0.0043/min, 30+ languages, real-time; best for custom vocabulary
Google Speech: $0.004–$0.016/min, 125+ languages, streaming; best for enterprise + diarization
Azure Speech: $0.016/min, 85+ languages; best for Microsoft ecosystem

rule.statement: Default to GPT-4o Mini Transcribe for accuracy at low cost; switch to AssemblyAI when diarization or structured output (summaries, chapters) is needed.
rule.rationale: GPT-4o Mini Transcribe at $0.003/min offers the best accuracy/cost ratio for single-speaker audio. AssemblyAI's LeMUR pipeline adds post-processing (summaries, action items) without extra API calls.

list.item: Whisper Large-v3: 1.55B params, 1x real-time speed, highest accuracy; use for offline max-accuracy
Whisper Large-v3 Turbo: 809M params, 216x real-time; use for production self-hosted balance
faster-whisper: CTranslate2 backend, 4x faster than original, same accuracy; recommended for self-hosted
whisper.cpp: CPU-optimized, GGML quantization; use for edge/mobile/no-GPU
Moonshine (27M–200M params): fastest, low memory; use for embedded/mobile

rule.statement: Use faster-whisper (Large-v3 Turbo) for self-hosted production; break-even versus API is at ~30,000 minutes/month (~500 hours).
rule.rationale: Fixed GPU cost is ~$276/mo minimum. Below 30K minutes, APIs are cheaper and have no ops burden. Above that threshold, faster-whisper Large-v3 Turbo delivers 216x real-time on a single A10G.

list.item: Real-time with latency <200ms → ElevenLabs Scribe
Real-time with latency <1s → AssemblyAI or Deepgram
Batch, high volume (>500 hrs/month) → self-hosted faster-whisper
Batch, <500 hrs/month, need diarization → AssemblyAI
Batch, <500 hrs/month, cost priority → GPT-4o Mini Transcribe
Privacy requirement, no cloud → faster-whisper local
Best accuracy: WAV (lossless, no compression artifacts)
Recommended upload: FLAC (lossless, smaller than WAV)
Acceptable: MP3, M4A (lossy but widely supported)
Web: WebM/Opus (small, good quality for 16kHz mono)
Target: 16kHz mono for speech; stereo and 44kHz add cost without accuracy gain

text.reference: Multi-provider TranscriptionService with fallback and cost tracking
